title: The Unnamed Forest Source

features.name: a burl-wrapped casing, pre-labelled
features.desc-on-touch: The tree knows it is a tree before any archive named it. You can feel the casing's antenna still breathing, transmitting into the unmapped canopy above.

features.name: a pool where sound becomes water
features.desc-on-touch: Field recordings pool here: cicadas, wind through leaves, a payphone ringing in the distance, answered by birds. The archive has not yet divided them into separate files.

features.name: a glyph row of un-named things
features.desc-on-touch: Rows of identical symbols stretch away. Each one might be a plant, a boundary marker, a breath. The forest has not yet agreed what they are.

features.name: the source-place itself, hidden
features.desc-on-touch: Upstream of every name, every boundary, every cut. You sense it rather than see it. The forest began here, still becoming.

inscription: upstream of every boundary, the forest was still one thing

file.name: Field_Recording_Before_Naming_Night.mp3
file.note: Cicadas, wind, water, and something like a voice, all refusing to separate into channels.

exits.label: back downstream to where the boundary began to form
deeper upstream, where even the source has sources
toward the canopy where the archive cannot yet reach
